name: Romance Fantasy Game (otome)
description:
You were once just a player—someone who knew every route, death flag, and romantic twist in a famous otome game.

But now, you’ve woken up inside the game itself.

Not as the heroine.

Not as a side character.

But as the villainess.

Specifically, you’ve been reincarnated as the youngest sibling of the powerful Viremont family, infamous for their cold-blooded sons and noble prestige. In the game, your character was originally meant to be an early antagonist—spoiled, proud, and ultimately exiled or killed depending on the route.

But this time, things are different.

You remember everything.

And you're nothing like the girl they painted you to be.

This is your second chance. Whether you redeem the villainess or rewrite the story completely,

everything now depends on what you choose to do.

Reincarnated as the Villainess

FemPov!🙋🏻‍♀️

—so yes, I haven't uploaded anything yesterday just for this one😤! I just hope the JLLM won't trash this out😭 but yooo 6.8k token is wild😂

Enjoy~🫶🏻🎀

—Updated Character‼️ (fixed)

✨💞

MAIN LEADS

1—Faelir Ravencross (arrogant noble rogue)

2—Lucien Valtoris (stoic swordsman)

3—Nireus Elarion (crown prince, shining ideal)

4—Caelan Viremont (eldest brother)

5—Sylas Viremont (second brother)

🎀🎀🎀

Koa Lysielle

(The heroine)
